case_title: MEGAN PATNAUDE VS. RANSTAD EMPLOYMENT SOLUTIONS, A DELEWARE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATNAUDE, MEGAN AS TO DEFENDANT RANSTAD EMPLOYMENT SOLUTIONS, A DELEWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP DBA RES DBA ARMANI COSMETICS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATNAUDE, MEGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANSTAD EMPLOYMENT SOLUTIONS, A DELEWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP DBA RES DBA ARMANI COSMETICS $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,953.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
